name: Apex Shell Jacket
description: Lightweight waterproof shell designed for alpine conditions with breathable GORE-TEX-inspired fabric and sealed seams.

name: Summit Insulated Hoodie
description: Midweight insulated hoodie built for cold-weather layering with thermal lining and wind-resistant outer shell.

name: Traverse Technical Tee
description: Moisture-wicking performance tee designed for hiking and high-output activity with quick-dry fabric.

name: Ridge Trek Pants
description: Durable stretch hiking pants with reinforced knees, water-resistant coating, and articulated fit for mobility.

name: Backcountry Cargo Pants
description: Rugged utility cargo pants designed for outdoor expeditions with multiple weatherproof storage pockets.

name: Stormline Lightweight Shell
description: Packable windbreaker designed for unpredictable weather with ultra-light ripstop fabric.

name: Alpine Down Jacket
description: High-loft insulated down jacket built for extreme cold with compressible fill and weather-resistant shell.

name: Trail Fleece Midlayer
description: Breathable fleece midlayer optimized for hiking and layering in variable mountain conditions.

name: Summit Utility Shorts
description: Lightweight outdoor shorts designed for warm-weather trekking with durable stretch fabric.

name: Alpine Knit Beanie
description: Warm merino-blend beanie designed for alpine environments with moisture control and thermal retention.
